productDisplayName: Scullers Men White & Blue Check Shirt
description: Style NoteThis shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft line fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and casual footwear.Product DetailsWhite and blue checked shirt, has a spread collar, short sleeves, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand tag appliqued on the pocket, full buttoned placket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% linenHand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
